w:r.w:t: Saint Lucia School Learning Management System (Portfolio Project)

Build a class-based Learning Management System (LMS) for a single school, supporting 9 homeroom classes (each of them 30 students) with structured role-based access control, assignments, grading, ranking, announcements, and attendance tracking.
API Layer: Convex client (no axios required)
Single school (the school has 9 classes, 3 classes (A, B, and C) for each grade)
Each class has its own management system
Users inactive until approved by Super Admin
Each student belongs to exactly one class
Each subject has exactly one specialized teacher
A teacher may be both Main and Specialized teacher
File OR text OR quiz answers
Based on average across all subjects
Students only see their own scores
Students can view their own attendance
Specialized teacher sees only their subject
Users can edit/delete only their own announcements
Single dashboard with conditional rendering based on role.
Average = Sum(subject assignment scores) / number of assignments
Tie breaker: earliest cumulative submission time OR alphabetical
Students restricted to their own submissions
